# Transcrição: 07 Warm Hot Custom Audiences

## [00:00 - 01:20]

Okay, so now I'm going to show you how to build what we call a custom audience. Now I'm in the Audience tab. Again, you will access this through Business Manager when you're in the ad account just by clicking on this little hamburger on the left hand side and then clicking on Audiences. What you'll see here is, this is sort of a dummy ad account, but what you'll see here is we've got custom audiences listed out. Now we created all of these and there's a reason they're all named this. It's using an e-commerce plugin, but you'll see some of them say website and then some of them are going to say database or email list or even if you look at this one, engagement video. So there's several different types of custom audiences that we can create. Now remember, a custom audience is anyone that has engaged with or interacted with you or your brand or your content before. So what we're going to do to create one of those is go Create Audience and we're going to click on Custom Audience. And you'll see here we've actually got four top level options. Let's go through each one of those separately.
